examples: When someone sneezes (打喷嚏) or coughs, the viruses can travel as far as one meter through the air, so you'd better stand a proper distance while talking to someone who has a cold.
Two loud sneezes finished his speech.
Fire Eater sneezes and forgives Pinocchio, who saves his friend, Harlequin, from death.
When a flu victim sneezes and coughs they send out thousands of droplets of flu-laden fluid.
It is thus natural that if its biggest customer sneezes, Vale will catch a cold.
